title: Bubble Over-fold (ICM)
description: ICM pressure — too tight on bubble loses EV (but over-call loses more)
coreRule: Bubble — средний стек folds wider чем chip EV, но короткий стек shoves wider. Не путать свою роль.

decisions.description: Bubble. UTG short (8BB) shoves. Hero BTN 99 (25BB). Call?

explanation.call: ✓ 99 vs short shove = easy call. You have ICM pressure but pot odds + equity justify.
explanation.fold: Over-fold. 99 beats short shove range (~50%), getting 2-1.
explanation.default: Mid-stack vs short shove: call wide. Fold только marginal broadways.

scenarios.title: Big stack vs mid shove — AJs

decisions.description: Bubble. CO mid stack shoves 20BB. Hero BB AJs (60BB). Call?

explanation.call: ✓ AJs close call even with ICM. Big stack not under pressure, mid-stack shoving wide.
explanation.fold: ICM tight fold OK — mid stacks shove JJ+/AQ+ on bubble.
explanation.default: Mixed spot. ICM aware — leaning fold vs tight mid-stack, call vs aggressive.

scenarios.title: Short stack vs tight — KTo shove

decisions.description: Bubble. Hero BTN KTo, 10BB. Big stack SB + mid BB. Action?

explanation.shove: ✓ 10BB KTo on bubble — still shove. Blinds matter, FE high (они tight by ICM).
explanation.fold: ICM fold OK — BTN shove with marginal = risk elimination.
explanation.default: Short stack bubble = shove slightly tighter. KTo marginal, but +EV.

decisions.description: Bubble. BTN short shoves 12BB. Hero BB AQo (30BB). Call?

explanation.call: ✓ AQo vs BTN short shove = snap call. Even with ICM — equity huge.
explanation.fold: CLASSIC BUBBLE OVER-FOLD. You're paying ICM tax for no reason.
explanation.default: AQo vs short shove BTN — always call. Fold = −EV даже under ICM.

decisions.description: Bubble. Chip leader UTG opens 2.5x wide. Hero CO JJ 20BB. Action?

explanation.shove: ✓ JJ 20BB vs big-stack open = shove. Leverage ICM on BTN/SB/BB.
explanation.default: 20BB JJ + bubble + chip leader opener = shove for max FE + value.

scenarios.title: Mid stack fold — ATs vs UTG

decisions.description: Bubble. UTG opens 2.2x. Short BTN behind. Hero HJ ATs (30BB). Action?

explanation.fold: ✓ ATs vs UTG + short behind = ICM fold. Don't play marginal spots.
explanation.call: Risky vs UTG range OOP + short behind activates.
explanation.default: Bubble + mid stack + UTG open = tight. ATs marginal, fold OK.
